name: create-amy-content
description: Write any content in Amy Benson's authentic voice (Diolog Founder & CEO), routed through eight persona variants: LinkedIn posts and thought leadership, long-form articles/blog posts, marketing content (announcements, launch/landing copy grounded in the diolog.app copy she curated and aligned with the Diolog voice & audience guide), sales/partnership outreach email (cold intros, consultative follow-ups, objection handling, gracious declines), Diolog investor updates, Slack/chat messages, short-form, and speaking notes for panels/podcasts/pitches. One evidence-anchored base voice (warm first, sharp underneath, direct questions with low-pressure asks, spaced-hyphen habit, no em dashes, AU spelling) synthesised from ~5,000 words of her verbatim email, LinkedIn, Slack and interview corpus (bundled, redacted), with a deterministic voice lint carrying her measured stylometric fingerprint. Generated with the create-voice-persona factory. v1.3 folds in Amy's own editorial review: broken-up LinkedIn formatting, genuine-question closes, peer-audience floor, referent discipline, register fencing for marketing, plain offer phrasing, no meta-labels, and retired phrases (bricks/Rome, 'came up through') enforced by the lint. v1.4 refreshes the bundled AI-signs field guide with the July 2026 empirical research layer and encodes the research-backed guards (plain copulas, epigram budget, hook-transition bans) in the base voice and lint config. v1.4.1 syncs the field guide's once-per-document epigram/contrast rule. v1.5 syncs the repeated-phrase lint check and the updated field guide (countable texture budgets, scaffold-slot trap). v1.5.1 field-guide sync. v1.5.2 lint pattern sync.
